instruction: Two subtle issues on the cloud off icon: the yellow star stamp is the wrong shade (dark gray) AND it has drifted slightly (~4px). Restore it precisely.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-off.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M22.61 16.95A5 5 0 0 0 18 10h-1.26a8 8 0 0 0-7.05-6M5 5a8 8 0 0 0 4 15h9a5 5 0 0 0 1.7-.3"/><line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/></g>
  <polygon id="star-stamp" fill="#444444" points="24,16 26,22 32,22 27,26 29,32 24,28 19,32 21,26 16,22 22,22" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-off.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M22.61 16.95A5 5 0 0 0 18 10h-1.26a8 8 0 0 0-7.05-6M5 5a8 8 0 0 0 4 15h9a5 5 0 0 0 1.7-.3"/><line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/></g>
  <polygon id="star-stamp" fill="#fde047" points="20,16 22,22 28,22 23,26 25,32 20,28 15,32 17,26 12,22 18,22" />
</svg>
